albums.title: Lambada on Saturn's Rings
albums.blurb: Debut full-length — irreverent, melodic, permanently orbiting the edge of taste.

albums.title: Vaudeville Nebula
albums.blurb: The EP that named the persona. Lo-fi, strange, deeply human.

albums.title: The Yellow 5
albums.blurb: Samba rhythms in zero gravity. Bossa nova on the event horizon.

albums.title: amerikanskoe porno
albums.blurb: Cosmically-influenced pop with a Cyrillic aesthetic — seductive, disorienting, unashamed.

albums.title: Tentacle Love
albums.blurb: Eight transmissions from the outer edge — raw percussion, interstellar bars.

album.title: Signal Finds Signal
album.note: Companion to the Maneki Neko Death Cult audio drama; not yet on the site.

books.note: Digital Insurgency, The Last Human CEO, Zero Trust Reality, Neko Death Cult are in production in the monorepo; the site shows 0 published so far.
